_doc: Hand-authored fixtures for a faithful-replay of a classic BrowserScope (Attach Browser) COM/environmental fault (job 7c4e0b9a, process PortalReconciliation, folder Finance). The faulted unattended run (MOCK-HOST) plus a prior successful attended run (DEV-BOX) supply the environment delta. Matching is token-aware with plain-substring fallback (first match wins).

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
